name: EchoHR - Lifecycle Feedback Guardrail
description: Daily guardrail across candidates, onboarding, goals, reviews, offboarding, and alumni so no person is left without a visible next step.

config.filter: Deadline Status in [Update due soon, Update overdue]
Feedback Status in [Feedback due soon, Feedback overdue]
Review Readiness in [Due this week, Overdue]

config.text: Lifecycle feedback due. EchoHR expects a visible next step and explicit date.
